title: Harris Seriously Good Triangular Shavehook Remove Coatings Paint from Shaped Contoured Surfaces
features: This shaving hook has been developed to help remove coatings, such as paint, from shaped and contoured surfaces.
Ideal for use on skirting boards, door architraves, stair banisters and furniture.
Clean with warm water, dry before storage
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Seriously Good Triangular Shavehook Contains 1 x Harris Seriously Good Triangular Shavehook After care Clean with warm soapy water, dry completely before storing. For use when removing coatings, such as paint, from shaped and contoured surfaces. For removing coatings from shaped and contoured surfaces. Suggested use For use when removing coatings, such as paint, from shaped and contoured surfaces. Ideal for use on skirting boards, door architraves, stair banisters and furniture. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
